purpose: Reusable scaffold for decomposing large OR models by scenario, time, resource, route, customer, asset, or complicating variables.
intended_use: Copy this folder when a direct mathematical program is too large or when decomposition can produce stronger bounds, scalable solves, or better structure.
Select Benders, L-shaped, Dantzig-Wolfe, column generation, branch-and-price, Lagrangian relaxation, ADMM, progressive hedging, or rolling decomposition as appropriate.
Record master/subproblem progress, cuts, columns, bounds, primal recovery, and convergence status in structured run records.
non_goals: This asset is not a complete decomposition solver.
This asset does not assume one decomposition method is always best.
This asset does not hide weak bounds, unstable cuts, or infeasible primal recovery.
This asset must not be used to generate toy or minimal examples that omit valid bounds, convergence checks, primal recovery, progress output, and original-model validation.

top_level_paths.coordination: Cut, column, multiplier, and convergence coordination contracts.
top_level_paths.scripts: Foreground run and compact result-collection templates.
